title: Treat rectal prolapse in pigs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Treat rectal prolapse in pigs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to treat rectal prolapse

pcs.text: Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and follow biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a pork production site.

pcs.text: Recognise signs of rectal prolapse and rectal strictures in pigs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise signs of rectal prolapse and rectal strictures in pigs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise signs of rectal prolapse and rectal strictures in pigs.

pcs.text: Determine treatment based on severity of prolapse or stricture, and pig health and condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine treatment based on severity of prolapse or stricture, and pig health and condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine treatment based on severity of prolapse or stricture, and pig health and condition.

pcs.text: Seek supervisor, veterinary or other expert advice where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek supervisor, veterinary or other expert advice where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek supervisor, veterinary or other expert advice where required.

pcs.text: Prepare work site, required resources and materials for treatment according to enterprise infection control procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare work site, required resources and materials for treatment according to enterprise infection control procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare work site, required resources and materials for treatment according to enterprise infection control procedures.

elements.title: Treat rectal prolapse

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks related to treating rectal prolapse
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks related to treating rectal prolapse?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, and assess and control risks related to treating rectal prolapse.

pcs.text: Select and fit personal protective equipment (PPE) according to enterprise safety and biosecurity requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit personal protective equipment (PPE) according to enterprise safety and biosecurity requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit personal protective equipment (PPE) according to enterprise safety and biosecurity requirements.

pcs.text: Isolate and/or treat pig according to Farm Treatment Plan using safe manual handling and low stress animal handling techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Isolate and/or treat pig according to Farm Treatment Plan using safe manual handling and low stress animal handling techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Isolate and/or treat pig according to Farm Treatment Plan using safe manual handling and low stress animal handling techniques.

pcs.text: Monitor pig improvement and/or continue treatment as required, and update treatment records
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor pig improvement and/or continue treatment as required, and update treatment records?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor pig improvement and/or continue treatment as required, and update treatment records.

pcs.text: Report abnormal outbreaks of rectal prolapse to farm management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report abnormal outbreaks of rectal prolapse to farm management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report abnormal outbreaks of rectal prolapse to farm management.
